overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Unity showing a character in period attire exploring the interior of a Gothic cathedral. The character walks through the main nave with dramatic sunbeams streaming through windows, examines the vaulted ceiling, and enters a restricted side chapel area with ornate woodwork.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic cathedral main nave with revolutionary flags

events.description: character stops walking and tilts camera upward to look at the vaulted ceiling and chandelier

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the cathedral nave toward the altar, then looking up at the architecture

notable_agents.action: wounded person lying on the floor near the left pillars
person sitting on a bench near the right wall

entered.detail: tall Gothic nave with pointed arches and stone columns
massive stone columns with carved capitals lining the nave
black and white checkered marble flooring
red white and blue revolutionary flags hanging from columns
ornate metal chandelier suspended from the vaulted ceiling
distant altar area at the far end of the cathedral
high Gothic ribbed vault ceiling with stone tracery

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the grand Gothic cathedral nave, passing wounded NPCs and period furniture. Sunbeams stream through high windows illuminating the checkered marble floor and French revolutionary flags. The character pauses to look up at the ornate vaulted ceiling and hanging chandelier.

scene_state.functional_zone: Cathedral main floor near side chapel entrance

events.description: character turns around 180 degrees and begins walking back toward the entrance area
character approaches and enters the side chapel archway marked as restricted area

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking toward the side chapel entrance on the right side of the nave

entered.detail: archway leading to a smaller side chapel area
short flight of steps leading up to the side chapel

segments.scene_description: After viewing the ceiling, the character turns around and walks back through the nave, passing the main altar area now behind them. They approach a side chapel entrance on the right, marked by stone stairs and an archway, transitioning toward a more enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: Restricted side chapel corridor with wooden pews

events.description: text 'Entered a Restricted Area' appears as character enters the narrow side chapel corridor
character briefly looks up at the vaulted ceiling of the side chapel

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor between wooden pews toward the side chapel altar

entered.detail: narrow passage flanked by wooden pews and stone pillars
dark wooden pews with carved details lining the corridor
decorative metal gate at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a restricted side chapel area, transitioning into a narrow corridor lined with dark wooden pews. The lighting becomes dimmer and more atmospheric. The character walks toward an ornate iron gate at the far end, briefly looking up at the detailed stonework above.

scene_state.functional_zone: Side chapel altar area with ornate flooring

events.description: character stops at the altar and looks around the side chapel area

agents.ego_description: reaching the side chapel altar and looking around the ornate interior space

entered.detail: small stone altar with candles in the side chapel sanctuary
intricate patterned marble floor with circular designs
elaborately carved wooden wall panels with religious figures

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into the side chapel sanctuary, featuring an ornate mosaic floor and a small stone altar. Light filters through stained glass windows, illuminating the carved wooden panels on the walls. The character pauses to survey the detailed craftsmanship of this restricted sacred space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grand Gothic cathedral that transitions from the vast, light-filled main nave into the intimate, dim confines of a restricted side chapel. It begins with the character walking across a checkered marble floor illuminated by dramatic sunbeams and French revolutionary flags, pausing briefly to look up at the ornate vaulted ceiling and a hanging chandelier. As the character turns and retraces their steps past the main altar, the scene shifts toward a stone archway and stairs that lead away from the open nave. The camera then follows the character into a narrow, atmospheric corridor lined with dark wooden pews and detailed stonework before passing through an ornate iron gate. Finally, the movement opens into a secluded sanctuary featuring a mosaic floor and carved wooden panels, where soft light filters through stained glass to illuminate a small stone altar.
